## Checklist

### Code

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Conventional Commits style (`fix(scope):`, `feat(scope):`, `docs:`)
- [ ] `python scripts/release_guard.py` passes
- [ ] `python scripts/check_public_privacy.py --ci` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for bug fixes
- [ ] Tested on: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 Git Bash -->

### Docs & security

- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/setup changed — or N/A
- [ ] `.env.example` updated for new env vars — or N/A
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or real user IDs in diff
- [ ] `python scripts/agent_security_audit.py --quick` — or N/A

### Telegram (if user-facing)

- [ ] Manual smoke in Telegram described below — or N/A
